items.name_en: Exclusive photo m11303 Monogram/Pink m11672 Monogram/Yellow
items.name_cn:
Exclusive photo m11303 Monogram/Pink m11672 Monogram/Yellow
Bloom Pouch Jh handbag combines classic Monogram canvas with soft leather on the sides, interpreting the inspiration of Monogram flowers with a gentle design. The compact structure can hold daily essentials like a short wallet, phone, keys, and lipstick, and the detachable chain allows for multiple carrying styles. Dimensions: 22.5 x 13 x 13 cm

items.name_en: Exclusive photo M11623 This Pochette Accessoire XL handbag is presented in Monogram Dust canvas, featuring a Monogram pattern weathered by time, injecting a bold spirit into the classic silhouette from 1990. The spacious main zip compartment features a patch pocket, along with a non-functional tassel nameplate and removable Marque L.Vuitton Déposée decoration. Monogram Dust coated canvas - aged calfskin trim - fabric lining - metal hardware - main zip compartment - interior patch pocket - non-functional removable tassel nameplate - removable round decoration - shoulder strap: removable, adjustable - dimensions: 28x16.5x9CM

items.name_en: Exclusive photo M83621 Magenta (Summer 2024)
items.name_cn:
Exclusive photo M83621 Magenta (Summer 2024)
By the Pool Summer Series, condensing the Diane bag into a miniature version. Coated canvas features vibrant Monogram Tiles Xph pattern, overflowing with romantic Mediterranean flair. The rounded flap opens with a strap, and leather trim adds an elegant touch.
The gift box packaging included with this product may be reasonably adjusted based on stock availability and may differ from the style shown on this product page; please refer to the actual gift box packaging received.
Size: 19 x 10.5 x 6 cm

items.name_en: Exclusive real shot m11461 (Summer)
items.name_cn:
Exclusive real shot m11461 (Summer)
This Pochette Métis Xph bag captures the vibrant tones and lively spirit of Monogram Tiles canvas, embellished with the LV Circle logo above the S-lock clasp. The academic bag structure features a top handle and a detachable long shoulder strap, suitable for shoulder and crossbody wear.
Size: 25 x 19 x 7 cm

items.name_en: Exclusive Real Shot m12019
items.name_cn:
Exclusive Real Shot m12019
Inspired by the 1960s Knick-Knack handbag, this Lockit BB handbag offers flexible carrying options. The Monogram coated canvas features a curved top edge and oval trim, echoing classic elements of the original design. The padlock closure pays homage to the brand's long heritage.
Size: 15 x 19 x 7 cm

items.name_en: EXCURSION Backpack Series M46932# Uninspected Version#
items.name_cn:
EXCURSION Backpack Series M46932# Uninspected Version#
❐ Size: 21*23*10cm ❐
This compact and practical EXCURSION small backpack is made of Monogram canvas with leather trim, exuding a hiking spirit. The main compartment features an adjustable slider closure, and there are two buckle pockets on the front. In addition to the top handle, it also comes with a chain, allowing for free switching of carrying styles.

items.name_en: Extraordinary Original Leather M24706 This Capucines East West mini bag is crafted from deeply dyed lambskin, featuring Monogram floral motifs and faux crystals integrated into the top handle. Dimensions: 22 × 12 × 8 cm

items.name_en: Full metal hardware, top-tier original sample, code-changing chip. Gaston-Louis Vuitton's 1932 champagne bag meets contemporary trends, transforming into the NéoNoé bucket bag, embodying heritage beauty. Monogram canvas outlines soft lines, paired with colored leather trim and matching multi-layered glued lining. Monogram coated canvas - smooth calfskin trim - microfiber lining - center zip pocket - detachable, adjustable shoulder strap!!
